creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The port security/openvpn fails after the port's update from openvpn-2.3.13_1 to openvpn-2.3.14:

cat: log.57234: No such file or directory
FAIL: t_cltsrv.sh

(1 test was not run)
Please report to openvpn-users@lists.sourceforge.net
